plugins.prepareCmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); p.version='${nextRelease.version}'; fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n'); const mp='.claude/metadata.json'; if(fs.existsSync(mp)){const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(mp,'utf8')); m.version='${nextRelease.version}'; m.buildDate=new Date().toISOString(); fs.writeFileSync(mp,JSON.stringify(m,null,2)+'\n');} console.log('[semantic-release] Updated version to ${nextRelease.version}');"
